description: Consumer group workflow — create group, read with acknowledgment

steps.explanation: Create 'mygroup' on 'mystream'. $ means only new entries. MKSTREAM creates the stream if it doesn't exist.

steps.action: Read pending entries as a consumer
steps.command: XREADGROUP GROUP mygroup consumer-1 COUNT 10 STREAMS mystream >
steps.explanation: > means undelivered entries. Each entry goes into the Pending Entries List (PEL) until acknowledged.
Mark entry as processed. Removes it from the PEL.
